title: Owls!
description: Transform the scary bats into cute little owls!
body:
### Owls!
Turn bats into cute owls along with new sounds and models!

![No Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gDlOPsww/images/5eacd1eaebb8726c30192eff6032ededee21710b.png)

- - -
<details>
<summary>Showcase with shaders</summary>

![AstraLex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gDlOPsww/images/7fb8a6e5a52ca0e1b215247d141d0fff97ba4756.png)
AstraLex
---

![Complementary Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gDlOPsww/images/7d7205e4a67a573d027432a8a81eb97c002c7fc0.png)
Complementary Reimagined
---

![Nostalgia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gDlOPsww/images/0c6f492bd93e830d2f0a1fbb418e6b7c663aca7b.png)
Nostalgia
---

</details>

- - -

### Dependecies

This pack requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)!

### Contribute

Want to improve the pack?\
Or just a place to chat?\
Then make sure to join my discord server!

### Easter Egg
![The killer owl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gDlOPsww/images/4b13d43fdd0ab65175e26b6809733b8500efd64b.png)
The Killer Owl.\
100 times cuter than The Killer Bunny!
